home.name: Nikolaos Gavras
home.subtitle: I build fast, elegant, and reliable web and mobile solutions.
home.profileImageAlt: A photo of me after graduating from Savon ammattiopisto.

intro.heading: Hi, I'm Nikolaos - Full Stack web and mobile application developer
intro.p1: I'm passionate about technology and programming, device repair and assembly, and developing intelligent systems.
intro.p2: In my free time I box, go to the gym, and experiment with new programming projects while developing my skills in web and mobile applications.

uiux.title: UI/UX
uiux.body: I develop web applications with modern UI that work smoothly on all devices and screens.

fullstack.title: Full Stack
fullstack.body: I master frontend and backend development as well as database design. I can work with multiple programming languages and development areas.

webMobile.title: Web & Mobile Development
webMobile.body: I use React for web development and Flutter for mobile app development. I also want to learn React Native.

job1.title: Mobile App Developer
job1.p1: I developed a mobile application with Flutter that uses the sekokuva-mobile-423k image classification model. I trained the model with PyTorch using transfer learning.
job1.p2: The application uses Firebase Authentication for login and Cloud Firestore for data storage.

job2.title: Web Developer
job2.company: Gourmet Street Food Oy · Work placement

degree.title: Vocational Qualification in ICT - Software Development
degree.p1: I completed a 180-credit vocational qualification focused on software development. Application design, implementation and testing, version control, databases.
degree.p2: PHP, HTML/CSS, Unity, JavaScript, phpMyAdmin, Virtualization, C#, MySQL

gyros.description: Website for a Greek restaurant located in Kuopio and Oulu. Static HTML site using Bootstrap, made during work placement.

gyrosReact.description: Redesigned restaurant website with improved UI/UX and an admin panel for editing menus and page content. Built with React + Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL (Supabase), deployed to Firebase.

kaavakanta.description: Taitaja2026 semifinal project - a web service where residents can browse current land use plan proposals and track the planning process.

jh.description: Website for a fitness coaching service, modern UI with an eye-catching call to action.

battery.description: Simple plist file reader for checking the battery health of Apple devices.

other.title: Other projects
other.description: More projects can be found on my GitHub profile. I cannot show all projects, e.g. Flutter and PyTorch related ones, as I have a non-disclosure agreement.
